hero.title: Let's Build Your
hero.description: Answer a guided funnel, choose your style and features, and get a professional website, online store, or custom web app built at a fraction of agency pricing.

problem.title: You Don't Need Another Agency Process.

painPoints: Clients forced to write all content themselves
MVPs or mockups instead of finished products
problem.slowDesc: Time is money. You're losing both.
problem.overheadDesc: You're paying for their fancy office, not your code.
problem.jargonDesc: They talk in clouds. We talk in conversions.

promise.title: Finished, Functional, and Ready to Launch
promise.quote: We do not deliver an incomplete MVP, a static mockup, or a half-built page.
promise.description: After you approve the plan and submit assets, the build begins. The result is a finished product ready to represent your business, capture leads, or sell services.
promise.disclaimer: Delivery in less than 48 hours applies to projects within the approved scope. We prioritize speed without sacrificing quality.

whyPossible.title: 48 HOURS IS POSSIBLE BECAUSE WE
whyPossible.description: Traditional agencies take weeks because they start with manual processes for every project. This system uses automation and lean workflows to produce finished products faster.
whyPossible.videoCtaSubtext: Watch how it works — then let us build yours.

faq.title: Got

items.question: How is 48 hours possible?
items.answer: We've removed all the traditional agency bottlenecks. No long meetings, no custom proposals for every project, and a guided funnel that collects everything we need in minutes. We use lean development patterns and AI-assisted workflows to build your finished product fast.

items.question: Is it a mockup or a finished site?
items.answer: It's a 100% finished, functional, and responsive product. We don't deliver MVPs or mockups. You get a live website, store, or app ready for your customers.

items.question: What if I don't have my content ready?
items.answer: Our funnel asks specific questions about your business goals and industry. We then use that information to generate high-quality AI-assisted copy as a base. You can review and suggest up to 2 revisions.

items.question: Can I add custom features later?
items.answer: Yes. All our products are built with scalability in mind. You can start with a 48-hour solution and add complex features, integrations, or more pages as your business grows.

faq.followupDesc: We're here to help you solve your digital problems fast.

finalCta.title: Ready to
finalCta.description: Get your finished website, store, or app in less than 48 hours.
